title: Senior Instructional Designer at Coursera India

jsonLd.title: Senior Instructional Designer at Coursera India
jsonLd.description:
Coursera India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Vadodara operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Coursera India:
Coursera India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Coursera India!
